narrative:
Dinsmore Township has 2,356 registered voters, with 54.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.0 percentage points.
